records.ety: [L. satietas, from satis, sat, enough: cf. F. satit.]

defs: The state of being satiated or glutted; fullness of gratification, either of the appetite or of any sensual desire; fullness beyond desire; an excess of gratification which excites wearisomeness or loathing; repletion; satiation.
quotes: In all pleasures there is satiety.
But thy words, with grace divine Imbued, bring to their sweetness no satiety.
